arts.ttl: FC Porto stance on possibility of Arsenal recalling Fábio Vieira this month
arts.sum: In his pre-match press conference ahead of the Champions League tie against Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday, Mikel Arteta touched upon Fábio Vieira’s situation at FC Porto.
